final_answer:
Current code ignores token pricing and calculates stake power/rewards from raw token amounts only.

Example using prices only as human context:

```text
1 GILT = $2
1 GOLD = $100
```

Suppose the code receives:

```text
validator self stake amount = 100
delegated stake amount = 1
```

Current code stores/calculates:

```text
validator.amount = 100
validator.delegatedAmount = 1
signedStakePower = 100 + 1 = 101
```

Reward example:

```text
CHECKPOINT_REWARD = 20,188
blockInterval = 1024
checkPointBlockInterval = 1024
signedStakePower = 101
currentTotalStake = 101
```

So:

```text
checkpointReward = 20,188 * 1024 / 1024 * 101 / 101
checkpointReward = 20,188
```

Then:

```text
proposerBonus = 20,188 * 10% = 2,018.8
remainingReward = 18,169.2
rewardPerRawStakeUnit = 18,169.2 / 101 = 179.893069
```

So before commission:

```text
self stake side = 100 * 179.893069 = 17,989.3069
delegated side = 1 * 179.893069 = 179.8931
```

If that validator is also the proposer, it also gets:

```text
+ 2,018.8 proposer bonus
```

Code points: raw validator stake enters through [StakeManager.sol](/srv/repos/gold-chain/bridge/pos-contracts/contracts/staking/stakeManager/StakeManager.sol:394), delegated amount is added in [StakeManager.sol](/srv/repos/gold-chain/bridge/pos-contracts/contracts/staking/stakeManager/StakeManager.sol:520), signed power is `delegatedAmount + amount` in [StakeManager.sol](/srv/repos/gold-chain/bridge/pos-contracts/contracts/staking/stakeManager/StakeManager.sol:600), and reward scales by `signedStakePower / currentTotalStake` in [StakeManager.sol](/srv/repos/gold-chain/bridge/pos-contracts/contracts/staking/stakeManager/StakeManager.sol:777).
